lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੀਵਹੁ ਅਮਰ ਫਲ ਖਾਹੁ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jug jug jeevahu amar fal khaahu |10|
lines.english: you shall live throughout the ages, eating the fruit of immortality. ||10||
Doubt is dispelled, and the Lord of the Universe is met.
He is the Embodiment of light, the incomparable essence.
On the tenth day of the lunar cycle, there is ecstasy in all directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਕਟ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tau jonee sankatt bahur na aavai |
lines.english: you will not have to suffer the pains of reincarnation again.
On the eleventh day of the lunar cycle, if you run in the direction of the One,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਲ ਨ ਮਲ ਨ ਛਾਹ ਨਹੀ ਧੂਪ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: amal na mal na chhaah nahee dhoop |11|
lines.english: He is stainless, without stain, beyond both sunshine and shade. ||11||
On the twelfth day of the lunar cycle, twelve suns rise.
The Lord was said to be far away, but He is found near at hand. ||12||
Your body will become cool, immaculate and pure.
Day and night, the celestial bugles vibrate the unstruck melody.
Then, one beholds the Father of the three worlds.
This is wonderful! The human being has become God! ||13||
On the thirteenth day of the lunar cycle, the thirteen holy books proclaim
There is no high or low, no honor or dishonor.
that you must recognize the Lord in the nether regions of the underworld as well as the heavens.
and on each and every hair, the Lord abides.
The Lord is pervading and permeating all. ||14||
On the fourteenth day of the lunar cycle, in the fourteen worlds
On the day of the full moon, the full moon fills the heavens.
Center yourself and meditate on truth and contentment.
Speak the speech of God's spiritual wisdom. ||15||
Its power is diffused through its gentle light.
Kabeer is immersed in the ocean of peace. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਮਧਿ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਿਆ ਥੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: aad ant madh hoe rahiaa theer |
lines.english: In the beginning, in the end, and in the middle, God remains firm and steady.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਮਿ ਭੇਦੁ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਪਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur gam bhed su har kaa paavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, you shall come to know the mystery of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਵਾਰ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ੭ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree vaar kabeer jeeo ke 7 |
lines.english: Raag Gauree, The Seven Days Of The Week Of Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰ ਬਾਰ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: baar baar har ke gun gaavau |
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord each and every day.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
and restrain the desires within the temple of the body.
On Sunday, begin the devotional worship of the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਅਨਹਦ ਬੇਣੁ ਸਹਜ ਮਹਿ ਬਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau anahad ben sehaj meh baae |1|
lines.english: then the celestial flutes play the unstruck melody in tranquil peace and poise. ||1||
When your attention is focused day and night upon that imperishable place,
On Monday, the Ambrosial Nectar trickles down from the moon.
Tasting it, all poisons are removed in an instant.
drinking in this Nectar, it is intoxicated. ||2||
Restrained by Gurbani, the mind remains indoors;
shall feel the terrible wrath of the Lord, their King. ||3||
On Tuesday, understand reality;
Those who leave their own home to go out wandering
you must know the way the five thieves work.
On Wednesday, one's understanding is enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਦੋਊ ਏਕ ਸਮ ਧਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur mil doaoo ek sam dharai |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, one comes to look alike upon pleasure and pain,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਮਲ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਬਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai kamal meh har kaa baas |
lines.english: The Lord comes to dwell in the lotus of the heart.
and the inverted lotus is turned upright. ||4||
On Thursday, wash off your corruption.
Forsake the trinity, and attach yourself to the One God.
At the confluence of the three rivers of knowledge, right action and devotion, there,
why not wash away your sinful mistakes? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਹਾਰੈ ਸੁ ਇਹ ਬ੍ਰਤਿ ਚੜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sukrit sahaarai su ih brat charrai |
lines.english: On Friday, keep up and complete your fast;
If you restrain your five senses,
day and night, you must fight against your own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਦੂਜੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਨ ਪੈਸੈ ਕਬੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tau doojee drisatt na paisai kabai |6|
lines.english: then you shall not cast your glance on another. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਦੀ ਵਟੀ ਘਟ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jot dee vattee ghatt meh joe |
lines.english: Steady within your heart;
On Saturday, keep the candle of God's Light

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਹੂਆ ਸਗਲ ਕਰਮ ਕਾ ਨਾਸੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tab hooaa sagal karam kaa naas |7|
lines.english: All your karma will be erased. ||7||
you will be enlightened, inwardly and outwardly.
